This '''vessel''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]] for travel to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 4]] {{1st}}
